Your AI Software Engineer

Fix bugs, run tests, and generate PRs automatically. Describe the problem in plain English — Coder Buddy handles the rest.

View Pricing
Free plan — 3 runs/monthNo setup, no infraPro from ₹499/month

How it works

Three steps. Under 60 seconds.

1
📁

Paste your repo path

Point Coder Buddy at any local Python project.

2
✏️

Describe the problem

Plain English — 'Fix all bugs in the auth module'.

3
🚀

Agent does the work

Plans, fixes, tests, and proposes a git commit for you.

coder-buddy — agent run

$ coder-buddy analyze --repo ./my-project --fix "Fix division bug"

→ Planner: Generating 4-step action plan…

✓ Step 1: Read calculator.py (142 lines)

✓ Step 2: Identified bug — line 31 uses * instead of /

✓ Step 3: Applied fix + wrote corrected file

✓ Step 4: pytest — 12 passed in 0.8s ✅

→ Commit: fix(calculator): resolve division operator bug

⚡ Completed in 28 seconds via Groq

Everything you need

Built for Python developers who ship fast.

Smart Planner

LLaMA 3.3 70B reads your codebase and creates a step-by-step fix plan.

Instant Fixes

Applies corrected code directly to disk — no copy-paste needed.

Auto Retry

Runs pytest, learns from failures, and retries up to 3 times.

PR Ready

Generates a Conventional Commit message and full PR description.

"Coder Buddy fixed a bug in 30 seconds that I spent 2 hours on. Insane."

Arjun M.

Backend Developer, Chennai

"The auto-retry feature is brilliant — it learns from pytest failures and fixes itself."

Priya K.

ML Engineer, Bangalore
